name: Tower of Void
short_description: Tower of Void is a tactical roguelike RPG. It features formation strategy, auto combat, loot farming and class progression. The core fun lies in building lineups, adjusting positions, equipping skills and gear to counter diverse enemies.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Progression +20
成長/積み上げ要素: Loot +18
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Upgrade Kit (Standard Edition)
short_description: Known for its dynamic combat, ensemble of versatile characters, and thrilling online co-op, Relink returns with expanded solo and multiplayer content, bringing endless adventure to skyfarers both new and old.
reasons: 次点ジャンル: Online Co-op +30

name: Forest Lookout
short_description: Forest Lookout is a first-person horror game where you navigate a lost person in a forest to safety. You can choose beetween options in dialogs to them. Listen to them, keep track of them, use your map and lead them out of the woods.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Tokyo Valkyries
short_description: Build the Deck That Saves Tokyo! Tokyo Valkyries is a roguelite deckbuilder where players craft a deck and strategize to defeat the enemies that stand in their way and progress through the map. Construct your deck and wield it to defend Tokyo from the Underworld invasion!
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10
現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Ars Et Anima
short_description: A relaxing educational experience set in the Renaissance: face ancient Latin quizzes inside the convent of today's San Marco Museum in Florence. Test your knowledge and help Beato Angelico complete a precious painting commissioned by Cosimo de' Medici.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Prison of Lies
short_description: In this short visual novel, four prisoners on death row are cleared of all charges. But the prison has a quota to meet. The four are put in a room and asked to decide among themselves over the course of an hour... who will be the one to die?
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: CluDoku
short_description: A murder mystery blended with sudoku-style logic. Explore suspicious rooms, examine weapon evidence, and piece together clues through sharp deduction to reveal the killer. Play alone or work online with up to 4 detectives to solve the case together.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Character Expansion Set: Fediel
short_description: This set unlocks the new playable character Fediel and comes with useful items to get her started. Set Content • Crewmate Card: Fediel • Ambrosia x 5 • The Black's Mark Fediel-Unique Sigil

name: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Character Expansion Set: Fraux
short_description: This set unlocks the new playable character Fraux and comes with useful items to get her started. Set Content • Crewmate Card: Fraux • Silver Centrum x 20 • Enchantress's Blessing Fraux-Unique Sigil

name: clear cherry ice.
short_description: Did I really save this pretty boy ten years ago...? A fresh summer youth BL visual novel about memory, promises, and mutual salvation. [clear cherry ice.] Get closer to Jiwon and Chaehyun, and see whether your bond becomes friendship—or something more.

name: 3DMurderMystery TheAshenYou
short_description: "The Ashen you" is a 3D murder mystery for four players. Set in a French manor in the 18th century, a mysterious case of death by fire has occurred. Relive the suspects' memories, explore the manor to gather evidence, and work together to uncover the culprit through discussion.

name: Sauve le Shérif !
short_description: Sauve le Shérif 4 à 10 joueurs. Deux saloons. Une seule règle : ne fais confiance à personne. Chat vocal en proximité, duels en face-à-face, et un dilemme à chaque tir : pacifier ou abattre.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Escape from Tarkov: TarCoin Special Offer
short_description: Get 2,000 TarСoins with a 100% bonus — customize your PMC, expand your stash, and unlock seasonal bundles in the Expansion Hub. Limited: one per account.

name: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Special Pack
short_description: Includes special character colors for the captain, Id, and Sandalphon. Also comes with useful items for unlocking Seofon, Tweyen, and Sandalphon.

name: Disney Dreamlight Valley: Honeyglow Woods
short_description: Explore the Honeyglow Woods, and reconnect with Disney's Winnie the Pooh, Eeyore and Piglet in a brand-new Adventure Pack!

name: Beghost
short_description: BEGHOST is a narrative-heavy 2D action-adventure game set in the bowels of a haunted dungeon. Uncover the dungeon's darkest secrets with your ghost girl companion Bee, as you navigate your way through enemies, traps, and more, in a desperate attempt to escape!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Plantify
short_description: Plantify is a third-person farming game which focuses on a small cat learning how to properly take care of plants.

name: Pocket Pond
short_description: A tiny angler who fishes on your desktop while you work. Pocket Pond is a cozy idle overlay where a pixel-art fisherman auto-casts, reels in 130 species, and fills your codex - no clicking required. Just let him drift in the corner of your screen and see what's biting.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Mushroom farm
short_description: Grow magical mushrooms in your own cozy farm! Cultivate 20 unique species, collect spores, and discover rare fungi on forest walks. A relaxing idle game with full controller-free play and 31 languages supported.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: The Adventures Of Hooman
short_description: A sci-fi comedy graphic novel where you play Hooman, an android too conceited to be scared and too lucky to die. Your crew is going to die but they could have avoided an untimely death if they had only listened to you. You are not the problem.

name: Escape from Tarkov: TarCoin Ingame Currency
short_description: Customize your PMC, expand your stash, grab seasonal offers. Make Tarkov uniquely yours. Bigger packs, better deals.

name: Escape from Tarkov: TarCoin Ingame Currency
short_description: Customize your PMC, expand your stash, grab seasonal offers. Make Tarkov uniquely yours. Bigger packs, better deals.

name: Surplus Value Simulator
short_description: This game is an abstract simulation of capitalism through the trade, flow, and conversion of surplus value, commodities, debt, equity, and land rights. Each unit has unique behaviors and an asset panel updated in real time.

name: Unpaired Socks
short_description: A relaxing pixel art game about matching socks. Figure out the matches to help 10 villagers sort through their messy piles of socks. Or just enjoy endlessly pairing for creating your own sock collection.

name: plink
short_description: One drop. Zero room for error. Can you master the physics of the bounce?

name: Neuro Hunter
short_description: Dark, Corrupt, buried deep in Secrets and Lies. Your prospects were low until the Corporation gave you an offer. A job too easy, too good to be true... it was!
